since_last: 6% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -1.05%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 6% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -1.53% · Gold +0.45% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 6% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -1.05%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.05%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -9.28%
cards.body: Leaders: AAPL +0.89%, SO +0.77%, PEG +0.58%, AES +0.27%, DLR +0.21%. Laggards: ISRG -9.28%, AMAT -5.35%, LRCX -4.90%, AMBA -4.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.65% at $125.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
